<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import 'dart:async';
2: 
3: import 'package:cached_network_image/cached_network_image.dart';
4: import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
5: import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';
6: import 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';
7: import 'package:speech_to_text/speech_to_text.dart' as stt;
8: 
9: import '../../content/anime/data/anime_api.dart';
10: import '../../content/anime/data/anime_models.dart';
11: import '../../content/movies/data/movie_models.dart';
12: import '../../content/movies/data/movies_api.dart';
13: import '../../content/shared/presentation/content_carousel.dart';
14: import '../../content/shared/presentation/poster_card.dart';
15: import '../../content/tv_shows/data/tv_show_models.dart';
16: import '../../content/tv_shows/data/tv_shows_api.dart';
17: 
18: class _Suggestion {
19:   final String imageUrl;
20:   final String title;
21:   final String type;
22:   final VoidCallback onTap;
23: 
24:   const _Suggestion({
25:     required this.imageUrl,
26:     required this.title,
27:     required this.type,
28:     required this.onTap,
29:   });
30: }
31: 
32: class SearchScreen extends ConsumerStatefulWidget {
33:   const SearchScreen({super.key});
34: 
35:   @override
36:   ConsumerState<SearchScreen> createState() => _SearchScreenState();
37: }
38: 
39: class _SearchScreenState extends ConsumerState<SearchScreen> {
40:   final _searchController = TextEditingController();
41:   final _searchFocusNode = FocusNode();
42:   Timer? _debounce;
43: 
44:   final _speech = stt.SpeechToText();
45:   bool _speechAvailable = false;
46:   bool _isListening = false;
47: 
48:   List<MovieSummary> _movies = [];
49:   List<TvShowSummary> _tvShows = [];
50:   List<AnimeSummary> _anime = [];
51:   bool _loading = false;
52:   String _query = '';
53: 
54:   @override
55:   void initState() {
56:     super.initState();
57:     _searchController.addListener(_onSearchChanged);
58:     _searchFocusNode.addListener(() {
59:       if (mounted) setState(() {});
60:     });
61:     _speech.initialize().then((available) {
62:       if (mounted) setState(() => _speechAvailable = available);
63:     });
64:   }
65: 
66:   void _onSearchChanged() {
67:     _debounce?.cancel();
68:     _debounce = Timer(const Duration(milliseconds: 260), () {
69:       final q = _searchController.text;
70:       if (q.isEmpty) {
71:         setState(() {
72:           _query = '';
73:           _movies = [];
74:           _tvShows = [];
75:           _anime = [];
76:           _loading = false;
77:         });
78:         return;
79:       }
80:       setState(() {
81:         _query = q;
82:         _loading = true;
83:       });
84:       _performSearch(q);
85:     });
86:   }
87: 
88:   Future<void> _performSearch(String q) async {
89:     final moviesFuture = ref
90:         .read(moviesApiProvider)
91:         .search(q: q)
92:         .then((r) => r.data)
93:         .catchError((_) => <MovieSummary>[]);
94:     final tvFuture = ref
95:         .read(tvShowsApiProvider)
96:         .search(q: q)
97:         .then((r) => r.data)
98:         .catchError((_) => <TvShowSummary>[]);
99:     final animeFuture = ref
100:         .read(animeApiProvider)
101:         .search(q: q)
102:         .then((r) => r.media)
103:         .catchError((_) => <AnimeSummary>[]);
104: 
105:     final results = await Future.wait([
106:       moviesFuture,
107:       tvFuture,
108:       animeFuture,
109:     ]);
110: 
111:     if (!mounted) return;
112:     setState(() {
113:       _movies = results[0] as List<MovieSummary>;
114:       _tvShows = results[1] as List<TvShowSummary>;
115:       _anime = results[2] as List<AnimeSummary>;
116:       _loading = false;
117:     });
118:   }
119: 
120:   Future<void> _toggleListening() async {
121:     if (_isListening) {
122:       await _speech.stop();
123:       if (mounted) setState(() => _isListening = false);
124:       return;
125:     }
126:     final started = await _speech.listen(
127:       onResult: (result) {
128:         _searchController.text = result.recognizedWords;
129:         _searchController.selection = TextSelection.collapsed(
130:           offset: _searchController.text.length,
131:         );
132:       },
133:     );
134:     if (mounted) setState(() => _isListening = started != false);
135:   }
136: 
137:   bool get _showDropdown =>
138:       _searchFocusNode.hasFocus &&
139:       _searchController.text.isNotEmpty &&
140:       !_loading &&
141:       (_movies.isNotEmpty || _tvShows.isNotEmpty || _anime.isNotEmpty);
142: 
143:   List<_Suggestion> get _suggestions {
144:     final list = <_Suggestion>[];
145:     for (final m in _movies) {
146:       if (list.length >= 5) break;
147:       list.add(_Suggestion(
148:         imageUrl: m.youtubeId != null
149:             ? (m.backdropUrl ??
150:                 m.thumbnailUrl ??
151:                 m.posterUrl ??
152:                 m.coverUrl ??
153:                 '')
154:             : (m.posterUrl ??
155:                 m.thumbnailUrl ??
156:                 m.coverUrl ??
157:                 ''),
158:         title: m.title,
159:         type: 'Movie',
160:         onTap: () => context.push('/movies/${m.slug ?? m.id}'),
161:       ));
162:     }
163:     for (final t in _tvShows) {
164:       if (list.length >= 5) break;
165:       list.add(_Suggestion(
166:         imageUrl: t.posterUrl ?? t.thumbnailUrl ?? '',
167:         title: t.title,
168:         type: 'TV',
169:         onTap: () => context.push('/tv/${t.slug}'),
170:       ));
171:     }
172:     for (final a in _anime) {
173:       if (list.length >= 5) break;
174:       list.add(_Suggestion(
175:         imageUrl: a.coverImage.extraLarge ??
176:             a.coverImage.large ??
177:             '',
178:         title: a.title.english ??
179:             a.title.romaji ??
180:             a.title.native ??
181:             '',
182:         type: 'Anime',
183:         onTap: () => context.push('/anime/${a.id}'),
184:       ));
185:     }
186:     return list;
187:   }
188: 
189:   @override
190:   void dispose() {
191:     _searchController.removeListener(_onSearchChanged);
192:     _searchController.dispose();
193:     _searchFocusNode.dispose();
194:     _debounce?.cancel();
195:     _speech.stop();
196:     super.dispose();
197:   }
198: 
199:   @override
200:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
201:     final theme = Theme.of(context);
202:     return Scaffold(
203:       appBar: AppBar(title: const Text('Search')),
204:       body: Column(
205:         children: [
206:           Padding(
207:             padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
208:             child: TextField(
209:               controller: _searchController,
210:               focusNode: _searchFocusNode,
211:               style: theme.textTheme.bodyLarge,
212:               decoration: InputDecoration(
213:                 hintText: 'Search movies, TV shows, and anime',
214:                 hintStyle: theme.textTheme.bodyMedium?.copyWith(
215:                   color: theme.colorScheme.onSurface.withAlpha(128),
216:                 ),
217:                 prefixIcon: Icon(
218:                   Icons.search,
219:                   color: theme.colorScheme.onSurface,
220:                 ),
221:                 suffixIcon: _speechAvailable || _searchController.text.isNotEmpty
222:                     ? Row(
223:                         mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
224:                         children: [
225:                           if (_searchController.text.isNotEmpty)
226:                             IconButton(
227:                               icon: const Icon(Icons.clear),
228:                               onPressed: () => _searchController.clear(),
229:                             ),
230:                           if (_speechAvailable)
231:                             IconButton(
232:                               icon: Icon(_isListening ? Icons.mic_off : Icons.mic),
233:                               onPressed: _toggleListening,
234:                             ),
235:                         ],
236:                       )
237:                     : null,
238:                 filled: true,
239:                 fillColor: theme.colorScheme.surface,
240:                 border: OutlineInputBorder(
241:                   borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
242:                   borderSide: BorderSide.none,
243:                 ),
244:                 contentPadding:
245:                     const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 0, horizontal: 16),
246:               ),
247:             ),
248:           ),
249:           AnimatedSize(
250:             duration: _showDropdown
251:                 ? const Duration(milliseconds: 250)
252:                 : const Duration(milliseconds: 150),
253:             curve:
254:                 _showDropdown ? Curves.easeOutQuart : Curves.easeInQuad,
255:             alignment: Alignment.topCenter,
256:             child: AnimatedOpacity(
257:               duration: _showDropdown
258:                   ? const Duration(milliseconds: 250)
259:                   : const Duration(milliseconds: 150),
260:               opacity: _showDropdown ? 1.0 : 0.0,
261:               child: _showDropdown
262:                   ? _buildSuggestionsDropdown(theme)
263:                   : const SizedBox(height: 0),
264:             ),
265:           ),
266:           Expanded(
267:             child: GestureDetector(
268:               behavior: HitTestBehavior.translucent,
269:               onTap: () => _searchFocusNode.unfocus(),
270:               child: _buildBody(theme),
271:             ),
272:           ),
273:         ],
274:       ),
275:     );
276:   }
277: 
278:   Widget _buildSuggestionsDropdown(ThemeData theme) {
279:     final suggestions = _suggestions;
280:     if (suggestions.isEmpty) return const SizedBox.shrink();
281: 
282:     final isDark = theme.brightness == Brightness.dark;
283: 
284:     return Container(
285:       margin: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16),
286:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
287:         color: theme.colorScheme.surface,
288:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
289:         border: Border.all(
290:           color: theme.colorScheme.outline.withAlpha(77),
291:         ),
292:         boxShadow: [
293:           BoxShadow(
294:             color: Colors.black.withAlpha(isDark ? 100 : 26),
295:             blurRadius: 24,
296:           ),
297:         ],
298:       ),
299:       child: Column(
300:         mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
301:         children:
302:             suggestions.map((s) => _buildSuggestionRow(s, theme)).toList(),
303:       ),
304:     );
305:   }
306: 
307:   Widget _buildSuggestionRow(_Suggestion s, ThemeData theme) {
308:     return InkWell(
309:       onTap: () {
310:         _searchFocusNode.unfocus();
311:         s.onTap();
312:       },
313:       child: Padding(
314:         padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12, vertical: 8),
315:         child: Row(
316:           children: [
317:             ClipRRect(
318:               borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(4),
319:               child: CachedNetworkImage(
320:                 imageUrl: s.imageUrl,
321:                 width: 32,
322:                 height: 48,
323:                 fit: BoxFit.cover,
324:                 errorWidget: (_, _, _) => Container(
325:                   width: 32,
326:                   height: 48,
327:                   color: theme.colorScheme.onSurface.withAlpha(26),
328:                 ),
329:                 placeholder: (_, _) => Container(
330:                   width: 32,
331:                   height: 48,
332:                   color: theme.colorScheme.onSurface.withAlpha(26),
333:                 ),
334:               ),
335:             ),
336:             const SizedBox(width: 12),
337:             Expanded(
338:               child: Text(
339:                 s.title,
340:                 style: theme.textTheme.bodyMedium,
341:                 maxLines: 1,
342:                 overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
343:               ),
344:             ),
345:             const SizedBox(width: 8),
346:             Container(
347:               padding:
348:                   const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 8, vertical: 2),
349:               decoration: BoxDecoration(
350:                 color: theme.colorScheme.secondary.withAlpha(30),
351:                 borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(4),
352:               ),
353:               child: Text(
354:                 s.type,
355:                 style: theme.textTheme.labelSmall?.copyWith(
356:                   color: theme.colorScheme.secondary,
357:                 ),
358:               ),
359:             ),
360:           ],
361:         ),
362:       ),
363:     );
364:   }
365: 
366:   Widget _buildBody(ThemeData theme) {
367:     if (_query.isEmpty) {
368:       return Center(
369:         child: Text(
370:           'Search movies, TV shows, and anime',
371:           style: theme.textTheme.bodyLarge?.copyWith(
372:             color: theme.colorScheme.onSurface.withAlpha(128),
373:           ),
374:         ),
375:       );
376:     }
377: 
378:     if (_loading) {
379:       return const Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator());
380:     }
381: 
382:     final hasMovies = _movies.isNotEmpty;
383:     final hasTv = _tvShows.isNotEmpty;
384:     final hasAnime = _anime.isNotEmpty;
385: 
386:     if (!hasMovies && !hasTv && !hasAnime) {
387:       return Center(
388:         child: Text(
389:           'No results found',
390:           style: theme.textTheme.bodyLarge,
391:         ),
392:       );
393:     }
394: 
395:     return ListView(
396:       children: [
397:         if (hasMovies)
398:           ContentCarousel(
399:             title: 'Movies',
400:             children: _movies.map((m) {
401:               return PosterCard(
402:                 imageUrl: m.youtubeId != null
403:                     ? (m.backdropUrl ??
404:                         m.thumbnailUrl ??
405:                         m.posterUrl ??
406:                         m.coverUrl ??
407:                         '')
408:                     : (m.posterUrl ??
409:                         m.thumbnailUrl ??
410:                         m.coverUrl ??
411:                         ''),
412:                 isRectangular: m.youtubeId != null,
413:                 title: m.title,
414:                 onTap: () => context.push('/movies/${m.slug ?? m.id}'),
415:               );
416:             }).toList(),
417:           ),
418:         if (hasTv)
419:           ContentCarousel(
420:             title: 'TV Shows',
421:             children: _tvShows.map((t) {
422:               return PosterCard(
423:                 imageUrl: t.posterUrl ?? t.thumbnailUrl ?? '',
424:                 title: t.title,
425:                 onTap: () => context.push('/tv/${t.slug}'),
426:               );
427:             }).toList(),
428:           ),
429:         if (hasAnime)
430:           ContentCarousel(
431:             title: 'Anime',
432:             children: _anime.map((a) {
433:               return PosterCard(
434:                 imageUrl: a.coverImage.extraLarge ??
435:                     a.coverImage.large ??
436:                     '',
437:                 title: a.title.english ??
438:                     a.title.romaji ??
439:                     a.title.native ??
440:                     '',
441:                 onTap: () => context.push('/anime/${a.id}'),
442:               );
443:             }).toList(),
444:           ),
445:       ],
446:     );
447:   }
448: }

<path>/root/dev/naijaspride/apps/mobile/lib/features/search/presentation/search_screen.dart</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import 'dart:async';
2: import 'dart:ui';
3: 
4: import 'package:cached_network_image/cached_network_image.dart';
5: import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
6: import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';
7: import 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';
8: import 'package:speech_to_text/speech_to_text.dart' as stt;
9: 
10: import '../../content/anime/data/anime_api.dart';
11: import '../../content/anime/data/anime_models.dart';
12: import '../../content/movies/data/movie_models.dart';
13: import '../../content/movies/data/movies_api.dart';
14: import '../../content/shared/presentation/content_carousel.dart';
15: import '../../content/shared/presentation/poster_card.dart';
16: import '../../content/tv_shows/data/tv_show_models.dart';
17: import '../../content/tv_shows/data/tv_shows_api.dart';
18: 
19: class _Suggestion {
20:   final String imageUrl;
21:   final String title;
22:   final String type;
23:   final VoidCallback onTap;
24: 
25:   const _Suggestion({
26:     required this.imageUrl,
27:     required this.title,
28:     required this.type,
29:     required this.onTap,
30:   });
31: }
32: 
33: class SearchScreen extends ConsumerStatefulWidget {
34:   const SearchScreen({super.key});
35: 
36:   @override
37:   ConsumerState<SearchScreen> createState() => _SearchScreenState();
38: }
39: 
40: class _SearchScreenState extends ConsumerState<SearchScreen> {
41:   final _searchController = TextEditingController();
42:   final _searchFocusNode = FocusNode();
43:   Timer? _debounce;
44: 
45:   final _speech = stt.SpeechToText();
46:   bool _speechAvailable = false;
47:   bool _isListening = false;
48: 
49:   List<MovieSummary> _movies = [];
50:   List<TvShowSummary> _tvShows = [];
51:   List<AnimeSummary> _anime = [];
52:   bool _loading = false;
53:   String _query = '';
54: 
55:   @override
56:   void initState() {
57:     super.initState();
58:     _searchController.addListener(_onSearchChanged);
59:     _searchFocusNode.addListener(() {
60:       if (mounted) setState(() {});
61:     });
62:     _speech.initialize().then((available) {
63:       if (mounted) setState(() => _speechAvailable = available);
64:     });
65:   }
66: 
67:   void _onSearchChanged() {
68:     _debounce?.cancel();
69:     _debounce = Timer(const Duration(milliseconds: 260), () {
70:       final q = _searchController.text;
71:       if (q.isEmpty) {
72:         setState(() {
73:           _query = '';
74:           _movies = [];
75:           _tvShows = [];
76:           _anime = [];
77:           _loading = false;
78:         });
79:         return;
80:       }
81:       setState(() {
82:         _query = q;
83:         _loading = true;
84:       });
85:       _performSearch(q);
86:     });
87:   }
88: 
89:   Future<void> _performSearch(String q) async {
90:     final moviesFuture = ref
91:         .read(moviesApiProvider)
92:         .search(q: q)
93:         .then((r) => r.data)
94:         .catchError((_) => <MovieSummary>[]);
95:     final tvFuture = ref
96:         .read(tvShowsApiProvider)
97:         .search(q: q)
98:         .then((r) => r.data)
99:         .catchError((_) => <TvShowSummary>[]);
100:     final animeFuture = ref
101:         .read(animeApiProvider)
102:         .search(q: q)
103:         .then((r) => r.media)
104:         .catchError((_) => <AnimeSummary>[]);
105: 
106:     final results = await Future.wait([moviesFuture, tvFuture, animeFuture]);
107: 
108:     if (!mounted) return;
109:     setState(() {
110:       _movies = results[0] as List<MovieSummary>;
111:       _tvShows = results[1] as List<TvShowSummary>;
112:       _anime = results[2] as List<AnimeSummary>;
113:       _loading = false;
114:     });
115:   }
116: 
117:   Future<void> _toggleListening() async {
118:     if (_isListening) {
119:       await _speech.stop();
120:       if (mounted) setState(() => _isListening = false);
121:       return;
122:     }
123:     final started = await _speech.listen(
124:       onResult: (result) {
125:         _searchController.text = result.recognizedWords;
126:         _searchController.selection = TextSelection.collapsed(
127:           offset: _searchController.text.length,
128:         );
129:       },
130:     );
131:     if (mounted) setState(() => _isListening = started != false);
132:   }
133: 
134:   bool get _showDropdown =>
135:       _searchFocusNode.hasFocus &&
136:       _searchController.text.isNotEmpty &&
137:       !_loading &&
138:       (_movies.isNotEmpty || _tvShows.isNotEmpty || _anime.isNotEmpty);
139: 
140:   List<_Suggestion> get _suggestions {
141:     final list = <_Suggestion>[];
142:     for (final m in _movies) {
143:       if (list.length >= 5) break;
144:       list.add(
145:         _Suggestion(
146:           imageUrl: m.youtubeId != null
147:               ? (m.backdropUrl ??
148:                     m.thumbnailUrl ??
149:                     m.posterUrl ??
150:                     m.coverUrl ??
151:                     '')
152:               : (m.posterUrl ?? m.thumbnailUrl ?? m.coverUrl ?? ''),
153:           title: m.title,
154:           type: 'Movie',
155:           onTap: () => context.push('/movies/${m.slug ?? m.id}'),
156:         ),
157:       );
158:     }
159:     for (final t in _tvShows) {
160:       if (list.length >= 5) break;
161:       list.add(
162:         _Suggestion(
163:           imageUrl: t.posterUrl ?? t.thumbnailUrl ?? '',
164:           title: t.title,
165:           type: 'TV',
166:           onTap: () => context.push('/tv/${t.slug}'),
167:         ),
168:       );
169:     }
170:     for (final a in _anime) {
171:       if (list.length >= 5) break;
172:       list.add(
173:         _Suggestion(
174:           imageUrl: a.coverImage.extraLarge ?? a.coverImage.large ?? '',
175:           title: a.title.english ?? a.title.romaji ?? a.title.native ?? '',
176:           type: 'Anime',
177:           onTap: () => context.push('/anime/${a.id}'),
178:         ),
179:       );
180:     }
181:     return list;
182:   }
183: 
184:   @override
185:   void dispose() {
186:     _searchController.removeListener(_onSearchChanged);
187:     _searchController.dispose();
188:     _searchFocusNode.dispose();
189:     _debounce?.cancel();
190:     _speech.stop();
191:     super.dispose();
192:   }
193: 
194:   @override
195:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
196:     final theme = Theme.of(context);
197:     return Scaffold(
198:       backgroundColor: const Color(0xFF0A0A0F),
199:       body: SafeArea(
200:         child: Column(
201:           children: [
202:             Padding(
203:               padding: const EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 8, 16, 8),
204:               child: TextField(
205:                 controller: _searchController,
206:                 focusNode: _searchFocusNode,
207:                 style: theme.textTheme.bodyLarge?.copyWith(color: Colors.white),
208:                 decoration: InputDecoration(
209:                   hintText: 'Search movies, TV shows, and anime',
210:                   hintStyle: theme.textTheme.bodyMedium?.copyWith(
211:                     color: Colors.white.withAlpha(80),
212:                   ),
213:                   prefixIcon: Icon(Icons.search, color: Colors.white70),
214:                   suffixIcon:
215:                       _speechAvailable || _searchController.text.isNotEmpty
216:                       ? Row(
217:                           mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
218:                           children: [
219:                             if (_searchController.text.isNotEmpty)
220:                               IconButton(
221:                                 icon: Icon(Icons.clear, color: Colors.white70),
222:                                 onPressed: () => _searchController.clear(),
223:                               ),
224:                             if (_speechAvailable)
225:                               IconButton(
226:                                 icon: Icon(
227:                                   _isListening ? Icons.mic_off : Icons.mic,
228:                                   color: Colors.white70,
229:                                 ),
230:                                 onPressed: _toggleListening,
231:                               ),
232:                           ],
233:                         )
234:                       : null,
235:                   filled: true,
236:                   fillColor: Colors.white.withAlpha(15),
237:                   border: OutlineInputBorder(
238:                     borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
239:                     borderSide: BorderSide.none,
240:                   ),
241:                   contentPadding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(
242:                     vertical: 14,
243:                     horizontal: 16,
244:                   ),
245:                 ),
246:               ),
247:             ),
248:             AnimatedSize(
249:               duration: _showDropdown
250:                   ? const Duration(milliseconds: 250)
251:                   : const Duration(milliseconds: 150),
252:               curve: _showDropdown ? Curves.easeOutQuart : Curves.easeInQuad,
253:               alignment: Alignment.topCenter,
254:               child: AnimatedOpacity(
255:                 duration: _showDropdown
256:                     ? const Duration(milliseconds: 250)
257:                     : const Duration(milliseconds: 150),
258:                 opacity: _showDropdown ? 1.0 : 0.0,
259:                 child: _showDropdown
260:                     ? _buildSuggestionsDropdown(theme)
261:                     : const SizedBox(height: 0),
262:               ),
263:             ),
264:             Expanded(
265:               child: GestureDetector(
266:                 behavior: HitTestBehavior.translucent,
267:                 onTap: () => _searchFocusNode.unfocus(),
268:                 child: _buildBody(theme),
269:               ),
270:             ),
271:           ],
272:         ),
273:       ),
274:     );
275:   }
276: 
277:   Widget _buildSuggestionsDropdown(ThemeData theme) {
278:     final suggestions = _suggestions;
279:     if (suggestions.isEmpty) return const SizedBox.shrink();
280: 
281:     return ClipRRect(
282:       borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
283:       child: BackdropFilter(
284:         filter: ImageFilter.blur(sigmaX: 20, sigmaY: 20),
285:         child: Container(
286:           margin: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16),
287:           decoration: BoxDecoration(
288:             color: Colors.white.withAlpha(15),
289:             borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
290:             border: Border.all(color: Colors.white.withAlpha(20)),
291:           ),
292:           child: Column(
293:             mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
294:             children: suggestions
295:                 .map((s) => _buildSuggestionRow(s, theme))
296:                 .toList(),
297:           ),
298:         ),
299:       ),
300:     );
301:   }
302: 
303:   Widget _buildSuggestionRow(_Suggestion s, ThemeData theme) {
304:     return InkWell(
305:       onTap: () {
306:         _searchFocusNode.unfocus();
307:         s.onTap();
308:       },
309:       child: Padding(
310:         padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16, vertical: 10),
311:         child: Row(
312:           children: [
313:             ClipRRect(
314:               borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(6),
315:               child: CachedNetworkImage(
316:                 imageUrl: s.imageUrl,
317:                 width: 40,
318:                 height: 60,
319:                 fit: BoxFit.cover,
320:                 errorWidget: (_, _, _) => Container(
321:                   width: 40,
322:                   height: 60,
323:                   color: Colors.white.withAlpha(10),
324:                 ),
325:                 placeholder: (_, _) => Container(
326:                   width: 40,
327:                   height: 60,
328:                   color: Colors.white.withAlpha(10),
329:                 ),
330:               ),
331:             ),
332:             const SizedBox(width: 14),
333:             Expanded(
334:               child: Text(
335:                 s.title,
336:                 style: theme.textTheme.bodyMedium?.copyWith(
337:                   color: Colors.white,
338:                   fontWeight: FontWeight.w500,
339:                 ),
340:                 maxLines: 1,
341:                 overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
342:               ),
343:             ),
344:             const SizedBox(width: 12),
345:             Container(
346:               padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 10, vertical: 3),
347:               decoration: BoxDecoration(
348:                 color: Colors.white.withAlpha(20),
349:                 borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(6),
350:               ),
351:               child: Text(
352:                 s.type,
353:                 style: theme.textTheme.labelSmall?.copyWith(
354:                   color: Colors.white70,
355:                   fontWeight: FontWeight.w600,
356:                 ),
357:               ),
358:             ),
359:           ],
360:         ),
361:       ),
362:     );
363:   }
364: 
365:   Widget _buildBody(ThemeData theme) {
366:     if (_query.isEmpty) {
367:       return Center(
368:         child: Column(
369:           mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
370:           children: [
371:             Icon(Icons.search, size: 80, color: Colors.white.withAlpha(10)),
372:             const SizedBox(height: 16),
373:             Text(
374:               'Search movies, TV shows, and anime',
375:               style: theme.textTheme.titleMedium?.copyWith(
376:                 color: Colors.white.withAlpha(80),
377:               ),
378:             ),
379:           ],
380:         ),
381:       );
382:     }
383: 
384:     if (_loading) {
385:       return Center(
386:         child: CircularProgressIndicator(color: Colors.white70, strokeWidth: 3),
387:       );
388:     }
389: 
390:     final hasMovies = _movies.isNotEmpty;
391:     final hasTv = _tvShows.isNotEmpty;
392:     final hasAnime = _anime.isNotEmpty;
393: 
394:     if (!hasMovies && !hasTv && !hasAnime) {
395:       return Center(
396:         child: Column(
397:           mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
398:           children: [
399:             Icon(Icons.search_off, size: 80, color: Colors.white.withAlpha(10)),
400:             const SizedBox(height: 16),
401:             Text(
402:               'No results found',
403:               style: theme.textTheme.titleMedium?.copyWith(
404:                 color: Colors.white.withAlpha(80),
405:               ),
406:             ),
407:             const SizedBox(height: 8),
408:             Text(
409:               'Try a different search term',
410:               style: theme.textTheme.bodySmall?.copyWith(
411:                 color: Colors.white.withAlpha(40),
412:               ),
413:             ),
414:           ],
415:         ),
416:       );
417:     }
418: 
419:     return ListView(
420:       children: [
421:         if (hasMovies)
422:           ContentCarousel(
423:             title: 'Movies',
424:             children: _movies.map((m) {
425:               return PosterCard(
426:                 imageUrl: m.youtubeId != null
427:                     ? (m.backdropUrl ??
428:                           m.thumbnailUrl ??
429:                           m.posterUrl ??
430:                           m.coverUrl ??
431:                           '')
432:                     : (m.posterUrl ?? m.thumbnailUrl ?? m.coverUrl ?? ''),
433:                 isRectangular: m.youtubeId != null,
434:                 title: m.title,
435:                 onTap: () => context.push('/movies/${m.slug ?? m.id}'),
436:               );
437:             }).toList(),
438:           ),
439:         if (hasTv)
440:           ContentCarousel(
441:             title: 'TV Shows',
442:             children: _tvShows.map((t) {
443:               return PosterCard(
444:                 imageUrl: t.posterUrl ?? t.thumbnailUrl ?? '',
445:                 title: t.title,
446:                 onTap: () => context.push('/tv/${t.slug}'),
447:               );
448:             }).toList(),
449:           ),
450:         if (hasAnime)
451:           ContentCarousel(
452:             title: 'Anime',
453:             children: _anime.map((a) {
454:               return PosterCard(
455:                 imageUrl: a.coverImage.extraLarge ?? a.coverImage.large ?? '',
456:                 title:
457:                     a.title.english ?? a.title.romaji ?? a.title.native ?? '',
458:                 onTap: () => context.push('/anime/${a.id}'),
459:               );
460:             }).toList(),
461:           ),
462:       ],
463:     );
464:   }
465: }

(End of file - total 465 lines)

part.text:
All done. Here's what was changed in `lib/features/search/presentation/search_screen.dart`:

1. **Added** `import 'dart:ui'` for `ImageFilter` (backdrop blur)
2. **Scaffold**: `backgroundColor: Color(0xFF0A0A0F)`, removed `AppBar`, wrapped body in `SafeArea`
3. **Search bar**: `fillColor: Colors.white.withAlpha(15)`, `BorderRadius.circular(16)`, borderless, `Colors.white70` icons, `vertical: 14` content padding
4. **Suggestions dropdown**: Glass panel with `BackdropFilter` (blur sigma 20), white 15 background, white 20 border, `BorderRadius.circular(16)`
5. **Suggestion rows**: Larger 40×60 cinematic thumbnails (2:3 ratio), white text with w500 weight, `Colors.white.withAlpha(20)` type badges, `Colors.white70` text on badges
6. **Loading**: `CircularProgressIndicator` with `Colors.white70`, `strokeWidth: 3`
7. **Empty/No results**: Large `Icons.search` / `Icons.search_off` (size 80, `Colors.white.withAlpha(10)`) with `titleMedium` primary text and `bodySmall` subtitle ("Try a different search term")

All Riverpod providers, speech-to-text, debouncing, and search logic are untouched.
